posts.text: can’t travel to beijing to meet with xi if it’s right after troops arrive in the persian gulf for a ground incursion.

europe wants nothing to do with president trump’s war on iran.

they don’t understand the aims, see the costs as extraordinary and weren’t asked about it before the missiles started flying.

iran doesn’t need to sink ships to keep the global economy in crisis.

just make the strait of hormuz too dangerous to cross.
@gzeromedia

Video
if president trump has one foreign policy message that has been received loud and clear, it’s that he doesn’t believe the united states needs allies to accomplish his goals.

war with iran isn’t just about oil.
natural gas. fertilizer. petrochemicals. 
global supply chains.

the global economic fallout
is just beginning.
@gzeromedia

Video
“nobody expected that." - president trump, on his surprise that iran hit bahrain, kuwait, qatar and the united arab emirates
maybe rebrand epic fury. call it operation enduring gratitude. then the allies would get on board.
germany: will not help the us secure the strait of hormuz, despite trump’s warning that nato countries have a “very bad future” if they refused to help.
ft not usually prone to hyperbole but this is way way overstated. ft.com/content/1c827f40-8d0d…

trump saturday: the united states has beaten iran “militarily, economically, and in every other way.”
trump sunday: i’m not ready to declare victory.
63% of young registered us voters have a negative view of israel
presumedly the board of peace should be offering trump naval support.
two weeks in, iran continues to ship its own oil out of kharg island, through the strait, to china.

in the old days president trump would have announced tariffs—side effect of the supreme court ruling.


Financial Times (@FT)

Trump warns Nato faces ‘very bad future’ if allies fail to help US in Iran ft.trib.al/aaWPhX2




— https://nitter.net/FT/status/2033319742807719997#m
nothing like a disastrous war to make an american president realize the value of multilateralism

trump, after saying he’s won the iran war and doesn’t need help in the strait, threatens to delay xi summit if the chinese don’t come to america’s aid.


Bloomberg (@business)

Donald Trump said he could delay his planned summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping if Beijing doesn’t help unblock the Strait of Hormuz, the Financial Times reported, citing an interview with the US president bloomberg.com/news/articles/…




— https://nitter.net/business/status/2033333205646848493#m
my god that’s a lot of israeli kids trtworld.com/article/d016472…

trump’s best move right now is declare victory, stop fighting and support negotiations to open the strait. 

zero confidence it’s going to happen. but the alternatives all look much worse to me.
“no guarantees” oil prices will fall in the near future. - us energy secretary chris wright

approximate/reported deaths from war in iran during 12 day war (2025) and in present iran war to date:

united states - 0, 13
israel - 29, 15
iran - 1200, 1400
